title: tribulus gillettiae
intro: Tribulus gillettiae, also known as the Indian caltrops or cat's claw cucumber, is a plant species in the Cucurbitaceae family, characterized by its small, green fruits with four sharp spines. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to improve kidney function, reduce inflammation, and act as a diuretic. Tribulus gillettiae has been reported to have various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and enhancing male fertility. Herbal preparations of Tribulus gillettiae are often available in capsule or extract form and are used to support kidney health, improve circulation, and boost the immune system.
